heading: Computation of retired pay
label: 3045 Computation of retired pay
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 853 of this title prior to repeal by .oPub. L. 107–372

children.heading: Officers first becoming members beforeSeptember 8, 1980
children.label: a Officers first becoming members beforeSeptember 8, 1980

children.text: the retired pay base determined under ; bysection 1406(g) of title 10

the retired pay multiplier determined under section 1409 of such title for the number of years of service that may be credited to the officer under section 1405 of such title as if the officer’s service were service as a member of the Armed Forces.

children.heading: Officers first becoming members on or afterSeptember 8, 1980
children.label: b Officers first becoming members on or afterSeptember 8, 1980

children.text: the retired pay base determined under ; bysection 1407 of title 10

the retired pay multiplier determined under section 1409 of such title for the number of years of service that may be credited to the officer under section 1405 of such title as if the officer’s service were service as a member of the Armed Forces.

children.heading: Treatment of full and fractional parts of months in computing years of service
children.label: c Treatment of full and fractional parts of months in computing years of service
A
children.text: each full month of service that is in addition to the number of full years of service creditable to the officer shall be credited as ⁄ of a year; and112

children.label: B
children.text: any remaining fractional part of a month shall be disregarded.

children.heading: Rounding
children.label: 2 Rounding
children.text: Retired pay computed under this section, if not a multiple of $1, shall be rounded to the next lower multiple of $1.
